title: The Trauma Floor
description: An investigation into the working conditions and psychological toll facing Facebook’s contract content moderators in Phoenix.

title: Bodies in Seats
description: Former Facebook moderators in Tampa break their nondisclosure agreements to describe desperate and dangerous working conditions.

title: Speak, Memory
description: After her best friend died, Eugenia Kuyda used his messages to build an artificial-intelligence memorial that could speak in his voice.

title: What really happened at Basecamp
description: How a list of “funny” customer names triggered an internal reckoning and a company-wide ban on political discussions.

title: The mess at Medium
description: Fourteen current and former employees explain how a celebrated experiment in digital publishing lost its way.

title: The withering email that got an ethical AI researcher fired at Google
description: Timnit Gebru’s final message to her colleagues reveals the conflict that preceded her dismissal from Google’s ethical AI team.

title: Twitter, cut in half
description: A day-one account of Elon Musk’s mass layoffs and the workers left to keep the platform running.

title: Yes, Elon Musk created a special system for showing you all his tweets first
description: A document-supported account of how Twitter altered its systems to boost its owner’s posts.

title: Inside Discord’s reform movement for banned users
description: Inside Discord’s effort to replace blanket permanent bans with more proportional punishment and user rehabilitation.

title: OpenAI’s alignment problem
description: What Sam Altman’s firing revealed about the unresolved tension between OpenAI’s nonprofit mission and commercial ambitions.
